title: Add LilyGO LICHEN gateway/app overlays
description: Why this exists: the board target alone is not enough; LICHEN apps need overlays and config fragments that bind the selected board capabilities to gateway/native-client firmware. What needs to be done: add app-specific overlay and conf files for the selected LilyGO target, enabling LICHEN L2 packet path, LoRa driver, BLE or serial local interface, logging, shell/diagnostics as appropriate, and HAL capability discovery. Acceptance criteria: gateway/native firmware builds for the LilyGO target; generated config confirms expected LICHEN, radio, BLE/serial, and HAL settings; optional peripherals are disabled or stubbed until validated; memory usage is recorded.
notes: Implemented and verified 2026-06-30. Source change: lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf now disables CONFIG_SLIP for T-Deck gateway because the global gateway default enables wired SLIP, which selects UART_PIPE and requires a zephyr,uart-pipe chosen node. T-Deck has UART0 bound to console/shell and no validated USB CDC/UART/BLE local-client binding yet, so local-client transport remains deliberately in project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6. Reviews: three independent codereview passes for the config change reported no code issues. They agreed CONFIG_SLIP=n is the correct board-local build fix; adding zephyr,uart-pipe=&uart0 would collide with console/shell; caveat recorded that this does not deliver the T-Deck local-client path yet. Verification: EC2 isolated workspace with ZEPHYR_BASE unset built both apps. west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway passed after CONFIG_SLIP=n. Gateway memory: FLASH 213996 B / 8388352 B (2.55%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KB (15.28%), DRAM 92552 B / 313 KB (28.88%), IROM 110986 B / 8 MB, DROM 148460 B / 8 MB. Generated config evidence: CONFIG_LICHEN=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_IPV6=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_SCHC=y, CONFIG_NET_DRIVERS=y, CONFIG_GPIO_HOGS=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y, CONFIG_COAP=y, CONFIG_COAP_SERVER=y, CONFIG_NET_IPV6=y, CONFIG_SLIP is not set, CONFIG_BT is not set. Generated DTS evidence matches puck: zephyr,lora, GPIO hogs, DIO2 RF switch, DIO3 TCXO. Optional BLE/serial local transport is disabled until project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.6 selects and validates it.
close_reason: T-Deck puck/gateway app board configs build in isolated EC2 workspace; gateway disables wired SLIP until local-client transport is selected in h7t5.7.6; review passes completed.
